Ahrefs.description: AhrefsBot — SEO analytics crawler operated by Ahrefs

Amazonbot.description: Amazon's web crawler used to train and enhance Alexa

Applebot.description: Apple's web crawler used for Siri and Spotlight Suggestions

Bingbot.description: Microsoft Bing's primary search indexing crawler

ChatGPT-User.description: OpenAI user-triggered fetcher used by ChatGPT browsing

Common Crawl.description: Common Crawl Foundation's CCBot — builds the public Common Crawl web corpus

GPTBot.description: OpenAI's web crawler used to improve future models

Google (user-triggered).description: Google user-triggered fetchers (Site Verifier, Read Aloud, etc.)

Meta-ExternalAgent.description: Meta's crawlers (meta-externalagent, meta-externalfetcher, facebookexternalhit, FacebookBot) — resolved via the full AS32934 (FACEBOOK) prefix list

OAI-SearchBot.description: OpenAI's SearchGPT crawler for search results

PerplexityBot.description: Perplexity AI crawlers: PerplexityBot (indexing) + Perplexity-User (answer-time fetch)

SE Ranking.description: SE Ranking's website audit crawler (SEBot-WA) — fetched via Wayback Machine; source page is behind Cloudflare

SERankingBacklinksBot.description: SE Ranking's backlink discovery crawler — fetched via Wayback Machine; source page is behind Cloudflare

Yandex.description: Yandex's search crawlers (YandexBot, YandexImages, YandexMobileBot, …) — resolved via the full AS13238 (YANDEX) prefix aggregate. AS13238 covers all Yandex infrastructure (search, mail, ads, cloud), so IP membership is advisory only; consumers must verify via rDNS + user-agent
